description_long: This bungalow features a low, sprawling profile with a prominent, multi-sectioned roof, including a main dark gray gabled roof and a secondary green-roofed porch area supported by wooden columns. The exterior walls are finished in a light neutral color, with a base trim in a muted red tone. Large rectangular windows are arranged in groups along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch area, which extends outward and is accessible by a small set of steps. The structure sits on a paved and partially grassed lot, with clear walkways and a driveway area visible.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-sectioned gabled roof, large grouped windows, and a covered front porch supported by wooden columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green-roofed porch, wooden columns, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the extended roofline and a secondary covered area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying grouped windows and the paved walkway along the house.
description_view_3: Angled view of the front and side, showing the steps leading to the porch and the window arrangement.
